_meta.drafted_by: Claude Code (thread) — Day 0 evening autonomous push
_meta.pricing_lock_value_note: Blueprint/spec say $37 for shift-economics; Day 0 task label had a stale '$32' reference. Canonical = $37.
post_create_actions: Save each product.id and price.id to 1Password vault 'MedCI — Stripe' under keys 'product_<slug>' and 'price_<slug>'.
Create Stripe Payment Link for each price with metadata.slug=<slug> and save the URL to the same 1P item.
Wire Payment Links into med-contract-site/public/pages/products/<slug>.html or the product grid on '/' (copy EMCI pattern).

product_payload.name: MedContractIntel — Complete Physician Contract Bundle
product_payload.description: Everything an internal medicine or hospitalist physician needs to evaluate and negotiate a contract: AI Contract Analyzer + IM/Hospitalist Red Flag Checklist + Negotiation Script Pack + wRVU Compensation Calculator + Shift Economics Analyzer. Save $78 vs. buying individually.

product_payload.name: MedContractIntel — AI Contract Analyzer (IM/Hospitalist)
product_payload.description: Upload your internal medicine or hospitalist employment contract and receive a benchmark-graded analysis covering base compensation vs. MGMA/AAMC/SHM/AMGA/Doximity medians, RVU conversion factor fairness, wRVU threshold/multiplier analysis, nocturnist differential, census/panel-size commitments, non-compete radius and duration, tail coverage, CME, and termination terms — plus a ready-to-send counter-proposal letter.

product_payload.name: MedContractIntel — Negotiation Script Pack
product_payload.description: Ready-to-use scripts for the eight most common hospitalist and internal medicine contract negotiation moments: compensation floor, RVU threshold push, nocturnist premium, tail coverage, non-compete reduction, CME increase, signing bonus clawback, and offer timeline. Each script includes opener, evidence line (ties to MGMA/SHM/AMGA benchmarks), ask, and fallback.

product_payload.name: MedContractIntel — wRVU Compensation Calculator
product_payload.description: Interactive calculator + walkthrough PDF for internal medicine and hospitalist RVU-based compensation. Model base salary vs. threshold vs. multiplier scenarios, compare against MGMA/AMGA/SHM medians by region and employer type, and see breakeven RVU targets for a given offer.

product_payload.name: MedContractIntel — Shift Economics Analyzer
product_payload.description: For hospitalists and nocturnists: break down the true $/hr of any shift schedule offer. Includes admissions cap modeling, post-call differential math, 7-on/7-off vs. flex schedule comparison, nocturnist premium benchmarks (SHM), and total annual comp at different block configurations.

coupons._note: Launch discount — 20% off bundle for launch week subscribers. Applied via Payment Link on Kit welcome email + first TikTok bio link. Auto-expires Day 12.
coupons.name: Launch Week — 20% Off Bundle
coupons.redeem_by_epoch_hint: Day 12 Thursday 2026-05-07 23:59 EDT — ops-controller computes actual epoch at create time

_day2_runner_notes: This spec is the input contract for the Day 2 Stripe-products-creation block. Owner does NOT need to be online — the create_product + create_price + create_coupon + create_payment_link MCP calls run autonomously.

Before calling create_product: confirm Stripe MCP is scoped to the MedCI Stripe account (get_stripe_account_info). MedCI uses a separate Stripe account from EMCI (Blueprint §8.2) — the MCP must switch accounts or have a MedCI-scoped connection.
If Stripe account is not yet created on Day 1 morning: this is an owner item (Stripe account setup with bank + business details). File under ESCALATED Day 1 if not present.
After create: Day 2 ops step writes each price_id + payment_link URL into med-contract-site/server/routes.ts or a product-data JSON the site reads from.
Kit welcome email uses the coupon-enabled bundle Payment Link — hard-code that URL into the welcome automation on Day 3 Kit-setup step.
DO NOT create subscription products. All 5 are one-time purchases. This matches EMCI and the blueprint spec.

_stripe_test_vs_live.day2_dry_run: Create all 5 products + prices in TEST mode first. Verify Payment Links + coupons work. Only flip to LIVE after Day 4 end-to-end dry run passes.
_stripe_test_vs_live.live_cutover: Day 4 late afternoon — recreate prices/links in LIVE mode, update site to point at live payment_link URLs, archive test artifacts for audit.
